title: nepeta connata
intro: Nepeta connata, also known as Blue Spotted Catmint, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Nepeta connata include relief from digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its potential to act as a natural anti-histamine. Nepeta connata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
